sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: May 14: Newton Golf to release Q1 results before afternoon call
feed.summary: Newton Golf Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: NWTG) will host a conference call on Thursday, May 14, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results. The results will be released via press release before the call. Management will lead the presentation, followed by a Q&A session.

feed.title: Pfizer (PFE) Reaches Settlement to Extend VYNDAMAX Patent Protection Until 2031
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. has reached settlement agreements with generic drug manufacturers to extend the U.S. patent protection for its transthyretin-mediated amyloidosis (ATTR-CM) treatment, VYNDAMAX, until June 1, 2031. This agreement maintains the drug's revenue stability beyond previous projections and solidifies its market position. Pfizer also discontinued VYNDAQEL in the U.S., streamlining patient care towards the once-daily VYNDAMAX.

feed.title: Nordson Corporation Announces Earnings Release and Webcast for Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026
feed.summary: Nordson Corporation announced it will release its second quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings on May 20, 2026, after market close. The company will also host a quarterly webcast on May 21, 2026, at 8:30 AM ET for investors. A replay of the webcast will be available on Nordson's investor website for those unable to attend the live event.

feed.title: Appian downgraded by Morgan Stanley on AI worries (APPN:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley downgraded Appian due to concerns over the impact of artificial intelligence on its business model, causing a 1.5% drop in shares during premarket trading. The investment firm points to potential limitations on seat growth and challenges to Appian's pricing model from AI-native competitors. To overcome investor worries, Appian needs to demonstrate sustained top-line or cloud growth, a successful transition to hybrid revenue models, and effective monetization of its AI capabilities.

feed.title: Hershey shares pressured despite Q1 beat as cost pressures weigh on margins (HSY:NYSE)
feed.summary: Hershey (HSY) shares are trading defensively in Thursday's premarket despite a Q1 top- and bottom-line beat. Investors are focusing on the 80 basis point impact of higher commodity costs and tariff-related pressures on the company's profit margins. This suggests concerns about future profitability despite strong current performance.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips cuts production guidance as Middle East war disrupts operations (COP:NYSE)
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) reported a 1.7% pre-market decline despite exceeding Q1 adjusted earnings expectations. The company lowered its annual production forecast due to operational disruptions in the Middle East. ConocoPhillips is a partner in QatarEnergy's liquefied natural gas export plant, impacted by the ongoing conflict.

feed.title: US Bancorp DE Has $503.04 Million Position in Mastercard Incorporated $MA
feed.summary: US Bancorp DE has increased its stake in Mastercard Incorporated by 0.3%, holding 881,164 shares valued at $503.04 million. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for Mastercard with a consensus price target of $659.00, following the company's Q1 earnings beat and dividend announcement. Mastercard is also making strategic moves in AI, data, and B2B payments to drive future growth.

feed.title: 8 data centers closed, $4M saved: PPG cloud overhaul wins award
feed.summary: PPG's Information Technology (IT) team has been honored with the 'Tech Team of the Year' award by the Pittsburgh Technology Council for its successful cloud-only IT transformation. This initiative led to the closure of eight global data centers, migration or retirement of over 5,000 workloads, and generated more than $4 million in annual savings. The transformation also enhanced developer speed and efficiency by up to 80% while strengthening security and compliance.

feed.title: National Grid plc Stock (GB00BDR05C01): £50M Grid Upgrade via Dynamic Line Sensors Announced
feed.summary: National Grid plc has announced a £50 million initiative to upgrade 585 km of UK transmission lines using dynamic line rating (DLR) technology to reduce consumer costs and power bottlenecks. This project, involving partnerships with LineVision, Ampacimon, and Heimdall Power, aims to enhance grid capacity and integrate more renewables, with most installations expected by 2028. The company's stable, regulated revenue model and involvement in US operations continue to appeal to income-oriented investors while supporting broader grid modernization goals.

feed.title: Regions Bank Names Veteran Banker Amy Barrentine as Head of Regions Business Capital
feed.summary: Regions Bank has announced the promotion of Amy Barrentine to lead Regions Business Capital, a specialized finance division within its Corporate Banking Group. Barrentine brings over 30 years of experience to her new role, where she will oversee teams providing asset-based lending and other tailored financial solutions to clients. This strategic appointment is expected to enhance the bank's capabilities in supporting businesses through various growth stages and capital needs across its key markets.

feed.title: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. Sells 33,658 Shares of Apollo Global Management Inc. $APO
feed.summary: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. significantly reduced its stake in Apollo Global Management Inc. by selling 33,658 shares, cutting its holdings by 50.2%. Despite Apollo beating quarterly EPS and revenue estimates and offering a quarterly dividend, analysts have trimmed price targets, and the company faces active securities-class-action notices and credit risks. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and Northern Trust Corp. increased their holdings in Apollo Global Management.

feed.title: US Bancorp DE Sells 11,507 Shares of Invesco QQQ $QQQ
feed.summary: US Bancorp DE reduced its stake in Invesco QQQ by 0.8% in Q4, selling 11,507 shares and retaining 1,366,550 shares valued at approximately $839.5 million. Market sentiment for QQQ is mixed, with dovish Federal Reserve signals and short-term buyer interest providing support, while concerns about an "AI bubble" and semiconductor weakness, highlighted by Michael Burry's shorts, pose downside risks. The ETF is currently trading near its 12-month high and recently distributed a quarterly dividend of $0.7328 per share.

feed.title: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. Acquires Shares of 43,432 First Western Financial, Inc. $MYFW
feed.summary: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. recently acquired a new stake of 43,432 shares of First Western Financial (NASDAQ:MYFW) valued at approximately $1.164 million. This acquisition, representing about 0.45% ownership, follows positive analyst upgrades and First Western Financial beating quarterly earnings estimates, with institutional investors now holding 60.26% of the stock. Insider activity also notes a director selling shares in February, while other hedge funds have also increased their positions in MYFW.

feed.title: Former Stryker Medical Division President Brad Saar Joins Sonablate Board to Support Growth of Non-Invasive Prostate Cancer Treatment
feed.summary: Sonablate, a medical technology company specializing in non-invasive prostate cancer treatment, has appointed Brad Saar, former president of Stryker’s Medical Division, to its Board of Directors. This appointment marks a strategic move to expand the adoption of high-intensity focused ultrasound (HIFU) technology as demand grows for non-invasive, function-preserving prostate care. Saar's extensive experience in scaling global medical technology businesses is expected to support Sonablate's growth, including international expansion and increasing physician utilization of its precision sound medicine platform.

feed.title: Allergan Aesthetics Launches Philanthropic Effort in Recognition of Skin Cancer Awareness Month
feed.summary: Allergan Aesthetics, an AbbVie company, announced a charitable initiative for Skin Cancer Awareness Month. They will donate $10 to The Skin Cancer Foundation for every new member who joins their Allē loyalty program through a referral in May, up to $100,000. This effort aims to promote education and prevention of skin cancer, highlighting the importance of daily habits like sunscreen use and regular skin checks.

feed.title: From dust to 55C, HPE targets AI workloads in remote sites
feed.summary: HPE has expanded its ProLiant edge portfolio with new ruggedized servers and chassis designed for AI and mission-critical workloads in harsh, distributed environments. These new solutions, including the HPE ProLiant Compute EL2000 chassis and enhanced HPE ProLiant DL145 Gen11 server, are built to withstand extreme temperatures, humidity, vibration, and electromagnetic interference, meeting stringent national security and telecom standards. The initiative aims to enable organizations to deploy AI inferencing and remote operations more efficiently and securely at the edge.

feed.title: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. Purchases 34,380 Shares of The Progressive Corporation $PGR
feed.summary: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. significantly increased its stake in The Progressive Corporation by 2,713.5% in the fourth quarter, acquiring 34,380 additional shares to bring its total holdings to 35,647 shares, valued at approximately $8.12 million. Despite mixed quarterly results where Progressive beat EPS estimates but missed on revenue, institutional investors collectively own about 85.34% of the stock, while corporate insiders have been net sellers. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.10 per share and maintains a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: T. Rowe Price’s Q1 2026 EPS beats forecasts, stock dips
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price reported adjusted Q1 2026 EPS of $2.52, surpassing analyst forecasts of $2.36, yet its revenue of $1.86 billion slightly missed the $1.87 billion forecast. Despite the earnings beat, the stock dipped 0.47% in pre-market trading due to concerns over net revenue and continuing asset outflows, which totaled $13.7 billion. The company highlighted strong earnings growth driven by higher average AUM and lower operating expenses, and discussed strategic investments in its ETF platform and alternative offerings to combat outflows and market volatility.

feed.title: CoStar Expects U.S. Industrial Vacancy to Peak in Early 2027
feed.summary: CoStar forecasts that the U.S. industrial vacancy rate will continue to rise, peaking in early 2027, due to challenges in absorbing new space despite better-than-expected leasing activity. The forecasted vacancy rate is slightly higher than previous expectations, and average annual rent growth for 2026-27 has been lowered to 1.6%. While new supply is expected to moderate by early 2027, leading to an inflection point for vacancy and rent growth, risks remain, including trade policy volatility, increased operating expenses, and subdued consumer spending.

feed.title: NKTR Investor Alert: Nektar Therapeutics Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Misrepresenting Trial Data Integrity: SueWallSt
feed.summary: A securities fraud lawsuit has been filed against Nektar Therapeutics (NASDAQ: NKTR) following a significant stock drop on December 16, 2025, when analysts flagged the inclusion of four ineligible patients in its REZOLVE-AA trial, causing it to miss its primary endpoint. Investors who purchased NKTR securities between February 26, 2025, and December 15, 2025, and incurred losses, may be able to recover compensation, with a lead plaintiff deadline set for May 5, 2026. Seven major Wall Street firms uniformly attributed the trial's failure and subsequent stock decline to these undisclosed enrollment violations, suggesting a direct causal link to investor harm.

feed.title: NUAI Lawsuit Alleges Company Allegedly Concealed Disclosure Timeline - New Era Energy & Digital Investors Face Losses Following Company Allegedly Concealed Disclosure Timeline: SueWallSt
feed.summary: SueWallSt is encouraging investors who suffered losses in New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (NUAI) to contact their firm, alleging the company concealed crucial information regarding its disclosure timeline. The lawsuit claims NUAI made materially misleading statements about permitting progress, data center development, and oil-and-gas operations between November 6, 2024, and December 29, 2025. Investors are urged to act by June 1, 2026, to apply for lead plaintiff status, as the stock plummeted 41% following revelations of regulatory issues and a New Mexico Attorney General lawsuit.

feed.title: Armadin and Palo Alto Networks Partner to Deliver Autonomous External Attack Validation Inside Unit 42 Frontier AI Defense
feed.summary: Armadin and Palo Alto Networks have partnered to integrate Armadin's autonomous external attack assessment capabilities into Unit 42 Frontier AI Defense. This collaboration aims to provide organizations with decision-grade evidence of their exposure to AI-driven threats by simulating real-world AI-powered attacks on their external perimeters. The partnership seeks to rapidly identify and remediate AI-driven vulnerabilities, thereby enhancing enterprise protection against sophisticated AI-equipped adversaries.

feed.title: MGM Resorts is on track to have the only casino resort in Japan in four years (MGM:NYSE)
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is making significant progress on its $10 billion MGM Osaka integrated resort project, which is set to become Japan's first legal casino resort. Located on Yumeshima Island, Osaka, the development positions MGM to potentially operate Japan's sole casino resort within the next four years.

feed.title: Yugabyte Named in 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Cloud Database Management Systems Report
feed.summary: Yugabyte has been recognized in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights "Voice of the Customer for Cloud Database Management Systems" report, achieving a 98% "willingness to recommend" score and a 4.7 out of 5.0 based on 40 customer reviews. This recognition highlights YugabyteDB's value in providing resilience, scalability, and high availability for mission-critical and AI-native applications. Customers praised Yugabyte's product capabilities, sales, deployment, and support experiences, affirming its role in modernizing data infrastructure.

feed.title: Honeywell International Insiders Sold US$2.0m Of Shares Suggesting Hesitancy
feed.summary: Over the past year, insiders at Honeywell International Inc. sold US$2.0 million worth of shares, with no insider purchases recorded. A single large sale by Lucian Boldea for US$1.3 million at US$221 per share, near the current price of US$210, was noted. Despite insiders owning about 0.05% of the company, the significant selling activity, particularly US$548k in the last three months, suggests potential hesitancy among those closest to the company.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Finance corrects coupon amounts on four note series
feed.summary: Wells Fargo Finance LLC has issued corrections to the pricing supplements for four series of notes totaling approximately $14 million under its $10 billion Euro Medium Term Note Programme. The amendments address manifest errors in the fixed coupon amounts for Series 76, Series 77 (Tranches 1 and 2), and Series 85 notes with maturity dates between 2038 and 2046. These corrections, which supersede original pricing supplements from March and April 2026, took effect today.

feed.title: Netflix, Adobe OK $25B Buybacks; Blackstone Backs Teva
feed.summary: Netflix and Adobe have each authorized new $25 billion share repurchase programs, with Netflix's plan having no expiration and Adobe's running through 2030. While Netflix's buyback is seen as offensive, Adobe's comes as the company faces AI disruption fears, leading to a muted market reaction. In contrast, Blackstone Life Sciences is investing up to $400 million in Teva Pharmaceuticals for its duvakitug development, showcasing a growth-focused partnership instead of capital return.

feed.title: Full Transcript: Textron Q1 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Textron (NYSE: TXT) reported a strong Q1 2026 with revenues up 12% to $3.7 billion and segment profit up 10% to $320 million. The company announced its intention to separate its industrial segment from its aerospace and defense (A&D) businesses within 12 to 18 months, aiming to create a pure-play A&D company. This strategic move is expected to enhance capital allocation and flexibility, with significant growth drivers identified in both the A&D segment, including the V-280 Valor program and a growing backlog, and the industrial segment.

feed.title: Teradyne upgraded at JP Morgan as firm says sell-off provides 'attractive' entry point (TER:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan has upgraded Teradyne (TER) to Overweight, citing the recent 20% post-earnings sell-off as an attractive entry point for investors. Following the upgrade, shares of Teradyne rose 5.5% in premarket trading. The investment firm believes the pullback offers a good opportunity for new investment.

feed.title: NNN REIT (NYSE: NNN) Q1 2026 results, portfolio and debt
feed.summary: NNN REIT, Inc. reported steady financial results for Q1 2026, with total revenues of $240.4 million and net earnings of $94.0 million. The company's property portfolio expanded to 3,711 properties across 50 states, maintaining a high occupancy rate of 98.6%. NNN actively managed its portfolio through new acquisitions totaling $145.4 million and dispositions generating $35.8 million, while also managing its $4.85 billion debt profile and declaring a quarterly dividend of $0.60 per share.

feed.title: Wendell David Associates Inc. Trims Stake in FactSet Research Systems Inc. $FDS
feed.summary: Wendell David Associates Inc. reduced its stake in FactSet Research Systems Inc. by 18.6% in the fourth quarter of 2025, selling 4,475 shares and holding 19,526 shares valued at approximately $5.67 million. Institutional investors collectively own about 91.24% of FactSet's stock. The company recently exceeded quarterly EPS and revenue estimates and offers a quarterly dividend of $1.10.

feed.title: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. Has $26.98 Million Stake in Union Pacific Corporation $UNP
feed.summary: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. significantly increased its stake in Union Pacific Corporation, with its holdings in the railroad operator now valued at $26.98 million, representing 2.3% of its portfolio. This comes after Union Pacific reported a strong Q1 earnings beat, leading analysts to raise price targets, although insider selling and regulatory concerns surrounding a potential merger with Norfolk Southern present some offsetting risks.

feed.title: Wendell David Associates Inc. Has $11.92 Million Position in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD
feed.summary: Wendell David Associates Inc. decreased its stake in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. by 7.2% in Q4, now holding 142,154 shares valued at $11.92 million. Other institutional investors like State Street, Capital International, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. increased their positions in CHD. Analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $101.59 for the stock, while the company recently reported strong quarterly earnings and issued positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. Has $13.38 Million Stake in The Boeing Company $BA
feed.summary: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. significantly increased its stake in The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) by 639.6% in Q4, holding 61,629 shares valued at $13.38 million. This comes as Boeing secures multiple commercial and defense contracts, beats EPS estimates, and receives analyst upgrades despite a recent ~3% stock decline and insider selling. Institutional investors own 64.82% of the company, which carries a high P/E ratio of 108.67.

feed.title: Top 2 Energy Stocks That Are Ticking Portfolio Bombs
feed.summary: As of April 30, 2026, Nabors Industries Ltd. (NYSE: NBR) and NGL Energy Partners LP (NYSE: NGL) are identified as overbought energy stocks, signaling potential warnings for investors who rely on momentum. Both companies have seen significant stock gains recently, with RSIs above 70, indicating they may be "ticking portfolio bombs" according to Benzinga Pro.

feed.title: FedEx, UPS pledge to refund customers after Supreme Court tariff decision
feed.summary: FedEx and UPS have announced they will refund customers for tariffs collected under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA) following a Supreme Court ruling. This decision invalidates Trump-era import taxes, potentially leading to billions of dollars in reimbursements to importers. Both companies emphasize their role as intermediaries and plan to pass along recovered funds once processed by U.S. Customs and Border Protection.

feed.title: Invesco QQQ $QQQ is Spreng Capital Management Inc.'s 5th Largest Position
feed.summary: Spreng Capital Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in Invesco QQQ ($QQQ) by 570.3% in the fourth quarter, making it their 5th largest holding valued at approximately $9.817 million. Other institutional investors also boosted their QQQ positions, with institutional ownership now at 44.58%. The ETF is trading near its 12-month high with a dividend yield of about 0.4%, despite mixed sentiment influenced by potential Fed rate neutrality, AI bubble concerns, and semiconductor market weakness.

feed.title: Mount Logan Capital Inc. (MLCI) amends proxy to update two director biographies
feed.summary: Mount Logan Capital Inc. (MLCI) has filed an amended proxy statement (DEFR14A) to revise the biographical information and director independence disclosures for two board members, Matthew Westwood and Edward Goldthorpe. This amendment, made before the original proxy statement was mailed, supersedes the previous filing. The proxy statement outlines details for the virtual 2026 Annual Meeting on June 25, 2026, including the record date for stockholders and the total shares outstanding.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (FTV) Fortive Corporation Reports Q1 Revenue $1.07B, vs. FactSet Est of $1.04B
feed.summary: Fortive Corporation (FTV) reported Q1 revenue of $1.07 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $1.04 billion. The company also announced Q1 adjusted EPS of $0.70 per share, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $0.64. Additionally, Fortive expects its adjusted EPS for 2026 to be in the range of $2.90 to $3, compared to the FactSet estimate of $2.96.

feed.title: Baxter Posts Q1 Loss Amid Mixed Sales Performance
feed.summary: Baxter International reported a Q1 2026 loss of $17 million, or $0.03 per diluted share, with adjusted EPS down 35% to $0.36, despite worldwide sales of $2.7 billion. Sales grew 3% reported but declined 1% organically, with mixed segment performance and ongoing pressures from higher costs and tariffs. The company reiterated its full-year guidance for flat sales and adjusted EPS of $1.85 to $2.05, focusing on operational stability and strategic initiatives post the Kidney Care divestiture.

feed.title: Garmin Ltd. (NYSE:GRMN) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Garmin Ltd. announced strong first-quarter 2026 results, achieving record consolidated revenue of $1.75 billion, up 14% year-over-year, and pro forma EPS of $2.08, exceeding expectations. The company saw double-digit growth in its Fitness, Aviation, and Marine segments, driven by advanced wearables and new product introductions. Despite geopolitical uncertainties and potential future commodity cost increases, Garmin maintains its full-year guidance and remains optimistic about continued growth.

feed.title: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Entergy Corporation reported strong Q1 2026 adjusted earnings per share of $0.86, exceeding expectations due to robust retail sales growth, particularly from industrial and data center customers. The company highlighted its "Fair Share Plus" pledge, which ensures new data centers like Meta's contribute significantly to infrastructure costs and community benefits, enabling a raised adjusted EPS outlook through 2029 and a substantial capital plan increase of $14 billion to $57 billion. Entergy continues to expand its renewables portfolio, manage regulatory proceedings, and focuses on operational excellence and customer-centric growth.

feed.title: Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with recurring revenue up 10% and total sales activity increasing over 35% year-over-year, despite missing EPS expectations slightly. The company is experiencing broad-based demand, particularly driven by AI-related infrastructure investments, and has raised its full-year guidance across key financial metrics. Equinix emphasizes its strategic position as a neutral digital ecosystem, enabling distributed, interconnected, and sovereign AI workloads for enterprise customers and hyperscalers, and is actively expanding its capacity and introducing new products like the Distributed AI Hub and Fabric Intelligence.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHRW) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, beating expectations with an adjusted EPS increase of 15% year-over-year despite rising spot market costs. The company emphasized its "Lean AI" strategy for driving productivity and market share gains, particularly in its North American Surface Transportation (NAST) and Global Forwarding segments. Management expressed confidence in achieving its 2026 operating income target and discussed navigating market conditions and potential impacts of legal cases.

feed.title: Bunge Global S.A. (NYSE:BG) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Bunge Global S.A. (NYSE: BG) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, exceeding expectations with an adjusted EPS of $1.83. The company raised its full-year adjusted EPS guidance to $9 to $9.50, attributing the positive outlook to robust performance in soybean and softseed processing and refining, improved market conditions, and strategic execution amidst a dynamic operating environment including geopolitical conflicts and increasing demand for biofuels. Bunge also discussed the successful integration of Viterra, which has expanded its global footprint and capabilities, and outlined its capital allocation priorities, including concluding a share repurchase program and investing in growth.

feed.title: Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ:BIIB) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Biogen Inc. reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $3.57. The company's growth products, including LEQEMBI and SKYCLARYS, performed well, contributing significantly to revenue. Biogen also discussed the strategic importance of the pending Apellis acquisition, its robust pipeline, and the potential for new high-dose SPINRAZA to enhance its SMA franchise.

feed.title: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE:GNRC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with net sales increasing 12% year-over-year and adjusted EBITDA margin expanding to 18.3%. The Commercial and Industrial (C&I) segment led growth, driven by data center demand and acquisitions, prompting a raise in full-year net sales and adjusted EBITDA margin outlook. The company is actively expanding its capacity and supply chain to meet growing demand, particularly in the hyperscale data center market, and sees long-term growth supported by rising electricity prices and a growing penetration opportunity for home standby generators.

feed.title: Methanex Corp declares qtrly dividend of US$0.185 per share
feed.summary: Methanex Corp announced a quarterly dividend of US$0.185 per share. This declaration comes amidst recent financial news, including a decline in Q1 adjusted earnings and a climb in revenue for the company. Analyst ratings for Methanex have been recently updated, with price targets ranging from US$65.00 to US$70.00.

feed.title: International Paper Swings to Profit, Issues Downbeat Outlook
feed.summary: International Paper reported a first-quarter profit, contrasting with a loss a year earlier, and exceeded analyst adjusted earnings targets. However, the company issued a downbeat outlook for the current quarter, projecting lower adjusted Ebitda, which caused its shares to drop premarket. This financial update comes as the paper-and-packaging producer prepares to split its North American and overseas operations.

feed.title: Travel demand boosts Hilton as RevPAR jumps 3.6%
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, driven by a 3.6 percent increase in systemwide comparable RevPAR. The company achieved a record development pipeline of 3,768 hotels and saw net income rise to $383 million. Hilton anticipates continued growth, projecting 2 percent to 3 percent RevPAR growth and $3.5 billion in capital returns for 2026.
